# QuiverAI Cursor Plugin

This repository is a public distribution artifact for QuiverAI users. It is synced from the private QuiverAI monorepo path `plugins/quiverai-cursor` and should not be edited directly.

## What It Includes

- A Cursor plugin manifest
- Hosted QuiverAI MCP configuration at `mcp.json`
- The QuiverAI SVG generation skill at `skills/quiverai/SKILL.md`

## MCP Server

The plugin points Cursor at the hosted QuiverAI MCP server:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "quiverai": {
      "url": "https://app.quiver.ai/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

Cursor handles authentication through its MCP login flow when the server needs login.

To verify the server is available:

```bash
cursor-agent mcp list
cursor-agent mcp list-tools quiverai
```

## Manual Fallback

If plugin-based MCP discovery is unavailable in your Cursor version, add this to `.cursor/mcp.json` in your project or `~/.cursor/mcp.json` globally:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "quiverai": {
      "url": "https://app.quiver.ai/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

Then authenticate from Cursor's MCP settings or with:

```bash
cursor-agent mcp login quiverai
```

## Source

Canonical source lives in the private QuiverAI monorepo. Public updates are published from `main` by QuiverAI automation.
